title: Fix contact form submission error

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the contact form submission error in ContactSection.tsx and the useSubmitContactForm hook (useQueries.ts). Ensure the form submits successfully to the backend, handles the response correctly, and displays a success message on completion instead of an error alert.

quotes: the form comes up as error when trying to submit. need fix

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the contact form with valid data does not display an error alert
A success message is displayed after a successful form submission
The backend correctly receives and stores the submitted form data
The submitContactForm mutation in useQueries.ts resolves without error for valid input
Form validation errors are shown inline and do not trigger the submission error path

constraints: Do not change the contact form fields or their labels
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Building a new submissions view (separate request)
